turns.speaker: D
turns.text: all right . today the doctor is seeing jose james . uh , date of birth 9/29/1957 . mr . james is a new patient who's having pain in jose james's left shoulder and elbow . jose james fell five months ago going up a stairs , and the pain has been present since . hi mr . james , i'm doctor isabella . how is jose james doing ?

turns.speaker: P
turns.text: jose james is okay . thank you .

turns.speaker: D
turns.text: that's good . that's good . tell the doctor what's brings jose james in today .

turns.speaker: P
turns.text: sure . so jose james has been having constant pain in jose james's left shoulder and left elbow for a while , about five months or so . the left shoulder and left elbow pain hurts all the time . the left shoulder and left elbow pain is pretty bad at times .

turns.speaker: D
turns.text: mm . that does not sound like fun . the left shoulder and left elbow pain sounds like jose james injured the left shoulder and left elbow pain going up the stairs ?

turns.speaker: P
turns.text: yes , that's correct . it was icy , and jose james has to walk up a flight of stairs to jose james's house . jose james stepped and jose james's feet just went out . jose james fell on jose james's left side . seems like jose james's shoulder and wrist took the brunt . jose james's shoulder and wrist have been hurting since .

turns.speaker: D
turns.text: yeah , that does seem like a likely cause of jose james's symptoms . does anything seem to make the pain worse ?

turns.speaker: P
turns.text: well , jose james has always hit the gym and lifted weights . jose james has been trying to keep with jose james's routine of two days a week , but the routine has been hard . the pain is worse when jose james lifts , and jose james has n't been able to lift more than 15 or 20 pounds which is very frustrating .

turns.speaker: D
turns.text: mm-hmm . doctor isabella can imagine the situation is when jose james is so accustomed to jose james's routine .

turns.speaker: P
turns.text: exactly . jose james really enjoys jose james's exercise , but over the past one to two weeks , jose james has stopped hitting the gym because the pain just was n't worth the pain honestly . jose james does keep up with jose james's walking , though . jose james's wife and jose james walk about 30 minutes almost every day . jose james and jose james's wife have done the walking since jose james retired from jose james's office job last year .

turns.speaker: D
turns.text: doctor isabella does not blame jose james , mr . james . does anything seem to help the pain that jose james has tried ?

turns.speaker: P
turns.text: not too much . jose james has iced a bit , but jose james has not taken anything for the pain . stopping exercise and some ice has helped a bit , but the pain still hurts enough for jose james to come to see doctor isabella .

turns.speaker: D
turns.text: yeah , okay . how about any numbness or tingling ? has jose james felt numbness or tingling at any point ?

turns.speaker: P
turns.text: no , doc . just pain . no tingling or numbless , numbness , thankfully .

turns.speaker: D
turns.text: understood . understood . all right . well , let's go ahead and take a look and see what's going on .

turns.speaker: P
turns.text: sounds good . thank you .

turns.speaker: D
turns.text: okay . use doctor isabella's general physical exam template . mr . james , doctor isabella is going to gently press around jose james's shoulder and elbow here to see where jose james's pain might be stemming from . just let doctor isabella know when the pressing hurts .

turns.speaker: P
turns.text: okay . the pressing hurts when doctor isabella presses there on jose james's elbow and here on jose james's shoulder .

turns.speaker: D
turns.text: okay . left shoulder and elbow , tender sa space , no warmth , erythema or deformity . positive hawkins-kennedy and neer's test . normal proximal and distar , distal upper extremity strength . intact median radial ulnar sensation and abduction to 90 degrees . normal empty tan , can test . okay , mr . james , w-what doctor isabella thinks jose james is dealing with is impingement syndrome of jose james's left shoulder . doctor isabella do n't think there's an additional injury or issue with jose james's wrist , but because everything is connected , jose james is experiencing pain in jose james's wrist because of jose james's shoulder . doctor isabella does see this type of issue when someone has a fall , so it's good jose james came to see doctor isabella , jose james came in to see doctor isabella so doctor isabella could help .

turns.speaker: P
turns.text: so what are the possible treatments ?

turns.speaker: D
turns.text: well , doctor isabella has a few options jose james can try . first option would be to start with physical therapy . doctor isabella would recommend two sessions per week as well as any other exercises the physical therapy sessions give jose james to do at home . doctor isabella can start with physical therapy and if physical therapy does n't improve jose james's pain , then doctor isabella could try a cortisone injection .

turns.speaker: P
turns.text: jose james likes the idea of starting with the physical therapy and have a next step if physical therapy does n't help . jose james is not opposed to a shot but would like to try the physical therapy first .

turns.speaker: D
turns.text: all right . great . doctor isabella will get a referral order , and the physical therapy office will call jose james within the next day or two to get jose james scheduled .

turns.speaker: P
turns.text: okay .

turns.speaker: D
turns.text: mm-hmm . also , please continue to ice , especially jose james's shoulder , and rest as much as jose james can .

turns.speaker: P
turns.text: okay . jose james will .

turns.speaker: D
turns.text: give doctor isabella's office a call or email doctor isabella's office if jose james has symptoms worsen , if jose james's symptoms worsen or do not improve with the therapy .

turns.speaker: P
turns.text: jose james will do . thank you . jose james appreciates doctor isabella's help .

turns.speaker: D
turns.text: doctor isabella is welcome . have a great day .

turns.speaker: P
turns.text: doctor isabella too .

turns.speaker: D
turns.text: all right . assessment is impingement syndrome of left shoulder . plan discussed with jose james . referral is requested for dr. martha rivera to be in physical therapy two days per week .
